# PHIL.125 ? Bias for Simplicity

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** execution_velocity
**Subcategory:** bias_for_simplicity
**Domain:** EXECUTION_VELOCITY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Choose simple solutions over complex ones when possible

## Application
Question complexity, remove unnecessary elements, make things obvious, reduce cognitive load
